# Silero TTS source capture

Captured at: 2026-05-25T03:04:44Z

Purpose

This folder stores a local documentation snapshot for Silero TTS so future ChatGPT and Codex runs can refer to one saved version of the public documentation.

Scope

- Documentation capture only.
- No model weights are included.
- No application integration is implemented here.
- No runtime behavior is changed.

Captured source URLs

- https://github.com/snakers4/silero-models
- https://github.com/snakers4/silero-models/wiki/Licensing-and-Tiers
- https://pytorch.org/hub/snakers4_silero-models_tts/
- https://pypi.org/project/silero/
- https://colab.research.google.com/github/snakers4/silero-models/blob/master/examples_tts.ipynb

License warning

The captured licensing page says the CE tier is non-commercial and that no commercial support, feature requests, or liability is implied. Re-check the Silero license before any commercial use.

Notes

- This folder is intentionally small and human-readable.
- The snapshots summarize official/public sources only.
- Any later TTS implementation should be designed separately from this documentation capture.
